α : Type u_1

inst✝ : Hashable α

k : α
h : m.size = m.buckets.size
⊢ (match m with
      | { size := size, buckets := buckets } =>
        match mkIdx ⋯ (hash k).toUSize with
        | ⟨i, h⟩ =>
          let bkt := buckets.val[i];
          let buckets_1 := buckets.update i AssocList.nil h;
          { size := size, buckets := buckets_1.update i (AssocList.modify k f bkt) ⋯ }).size =
    (match m with
        | { size := size, buckets := buckets } =>
          match mkIdx ⋯ (hash k).toUSize with
          | ⟨i, h⟩ =>
            let bkt := buckets.val[i];
            let buckets_1 := buckets.update i AssocList.nil h;
            { size := size, buckets := buckets_1.update i (AssocList.modify k f bkt) ⋯ }).buckets.size
